title: Custom over off-the-shelf.
body: Every engagement starts with the question, not the platform. We build the dataset that answers your specific brief, then keep monitoring it.

title: Machine-assembled, human-qualified.
body: Pipelines do the breadth; analysts handle the judgment calls. Nothing leaves the building unless a person has signed off on it.

title: Small core, deep network.
body: Two founders. A trusted bench of subject-matter partners across litigation, on-the-ground research, and regional intelligence.
